data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of refunding to an expired original card, but the evidence does not provide any details regarding the refund logic or how it handles expired payment methods. The linked use case mentions refund logic that handles FX differences, but there is no specific mention of how expired cards are treated, leading to a clear gap in the requirement. This lack of evidence directly impacts the ability to confirm the expected outcome of the scenario.
gaps: No evidence of refund logic that handles expired payment methods.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
